name: Tata Tele Infra Ltd
notes: Premium grade telecom supplier. Standard payment terms: Net-30. Consistent uptime & delivery.
aiSummary: Tata Tele Infra Ltd has maintained a 98% on-time delivery rate over the last 12 months. Lead time stands at 4.2 days. Recommended for high-value hardware sourcing.

notes: SaaS and digital software license provider. Instant code generation & activation.

name: Vellore Tech Importers
notes: Niche routing accessories and endpoints importer. High transit variances.
aiSummary: Vellore Tech Importers has experienced shipping delays in 15% of recent shipments. Recommend setting a buffer of 10 days for orders or finding secondary backups.
